description: Style NoteFor the non-conformist high-fashion male, this pair of shoes from red tape is the right choice. Styled in genuine, soft leather for optimal comfort, this pair does not compromise on its style quotient. Wear them with your work wear formals. You'll create a great impression in the office if you pair them up with a slim Fit shirt, flat front trousers - and don't forget to match your belt with your shoes.Product DetailsLeather upper for comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearElasticated gores under the tonguePadded footbed for all-day comfortEVA midsole for impact protectionTPR outsole with a stacked heel and patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
